summary: RBAC STEP 0 Backend Testing Complete - All 28 tests PASSED. All RBAC API endpoints working correctly including permissions, roles CRUD, user role assignment, super_admin management, permission enforcement, and audit logging.

TestBootstrap.test_bootstrap_four_default_roles: PASSED - Verified 4 system roles: Super Admin, Moderatore, Gestore Leghe, Osservatore

TestMyPermissionsEndpoint.test_my_permissions_super_admin: PASSED - Super admin gets all 12 permissions

TestUpdateRole.test_update_role_success: PASSED - Updated role name and permissions

TestDeleteRole.test_delete_custom_role_success: PASSED - Custom role deleted with cascade removal from users

TestUsersEndpoint.test_list_users_success: PASSED - Lists users with role details

TestSuperAdminFlag.test_cannot_remove_own_super_admin: PASSED - 400 when trying to remove own flag

TestPermissionEnforcement.test_regular_user_no_roles_gets_403: PASSED - 403 on all admin RBAC endpoints
TestPermissionEnforcement.test_user_with_role_can_access_permitted: PASSED - User with Osservatore role gets correct permissions
TestPermissionEnforcement.test_super_admin_bypasses_all_checks: PASSED - Super admin accesses all endpoints

TestAuditLogsWithRBAC.test_audit_log_includes_rbac_fields: PASSED - Audit logs include actor_roles, ip, before, after

verified_features: GET /api/rbac/permissions - returns 12 permissions (requires admin.roles.manage or super_admin)
GET /api/rbac/my-permissions - returns current user's aggregated permissions
POST /api/rbac/roles - create custom role with valid permissions
DELETE /api/rbac/roles/{id} - delete custom role + cascade remove from users
DELETE /api/rbac/roles/{id} - prevents deletion of system roles (403)
GET /api/rbac/users - lists all users with role details
PUT /api/rbac/users/{id}/super-admin - set/unset super_admin flag (only super_admin can do this)
Permission enforcement: regular user without roles gets 403 on admin endpoints
Permission enforcement: user with specific role only accesses permitted endpoints
Super admin bypasses all permission checks
Bootstrap: 4 default roles created (Super Admin, Moderatore, Gestore Leghe, Osservatore)
Existing admin endpoints (/api/admin/*) still work with require_admin
Audit logs include new fields: actor_roles, ip, before, after
critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation follows best practices - factory pattern for require_permission middleware
Permission aggregation correctly handles multiple roles per user
Super admin bypass is correctly implemented at the middleware level
Cascade delete of roles from users is implemented correctly via $pull operation
Audit logging enhanced with actor_roles, ip, before/after fields for full traceability
System roles (is_system=true) are protected from deletion
No issues found with the RBAC implementation
seed_data_creation: Tests used existing admin and regular user accounts. All test-created roles were cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC STEP 0 fully implemented and tested. 4 default system roles bootstrapped on startup. admin@fantapronostic.com is super_admin. All RBAC endpoints under /api/rbac/* are working. Permission middleware (require_permission factory) enforces access control. Next step would be integrating RBAC into the admin-ui web dashboard.
